decisions: WordPress users represent providers, freelancers, and customers.
service_listing custom post type represents migrated Flynax listings.
service_category hierarchical taxonomy represents migrated Flynax categories.
Custom tables represent stateful CRM workflows, claims, reservations, conversations, leads, coverage zones, AI knowledge, media mapping, redirects, and migration traceability.
Every imported Flynax object must preserve source IDs and migration batch IDs.
Claims are seeded during migration but SMS OTP verification and ownership transfer happen only at runtime.
Migration must be staged, idempotent, and reversible by batch.
next_step: Review and approve architecture/data model, then run source schema audit before coding.
